title: Cuneiform Tablet #0795: Old Babylonian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
